name: Chronic Supplementation With a Mitochondrial Antioxidant (MitoQ) Improves Vascular Function in Healthy Older Adults
summary: A randomized placebo-controlled crossover trial of MitoQ in healthy older adults with impaired endothelial function, focused on brachial artery flow-mediated dilation, mitochondrial oxidative stress, oxidized LDL, and safety.
